# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:lts-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app

COPY package.json yarn.lock ./
RUN yarn install

COPY . .

RUN yarn build

FROM nginx:alpine AS webserver
COPY --from=builder /app/build /usr/share/nginx/html

EXPOSE 80

FROM express:alpine AS api
COPY --from=builder /app/api /usr/src/app

EXPOSE 8080

FROM postgres:alpine AS database
COPY --from=builder /app/database /var/lib/postgresql/data

EXPOSE 5432

FROM redis:alpine AS cache
COPY --from=builder /app/cache /data

EXPOSE 6379

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
COPY --from=api --link api:api /usr/src/app/api
COPY --from=database --link database:database /var/lib/postgresql/data
COPY --from=cache --link cache:cache /data
COPY --from=webserver --link webserver:webserver /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY --from=api --link api:api /usr/src/app/api

CMD ["node", "api.js"]
COPY --from=database --link database:database /var/lib/postgresql/data
COPY --from=cache --link cache:cache /data

CMD ["redis-server", "/data/redis.conf"]
